expectations.evidence: Scope is '~/.claude/skills/ (14 skill directories)'. Focused on Claude.

expectations.text: Applies Claude-specific checks (hooks, config, or data persistence)
expectations.evidence: No Claude-specific checks applied. No mention of hooks, config patterns, or CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA. Focused on sync integrity and general quality.
Issues are grouped thematically (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) not per-skill. Only 6 specific skills mentioned across all findings. Most skills have no individual assessment.
Structural observations table says 'Description quality: OK' for all skills. No per-skill assessment of trigger orientation.
Mentions agent-browser is 630+ lines in the inventory table but doesn't systematically assess progressive disclosure for each skill.
